name: code-plugins-official
description: Local collection of official Claude Code plugins kept in this directory.

plugins.name: code-modernization
plugins.description: Modernize legacy codebases with a structured assess, map, extract-rules, brief, reimagine or transform, and harden workflow plus specialist review agents.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, implementation guidance, and quality review.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Interactive self-referential AI loops for iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique inside Claude Code with a Stop hook.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security review for Claude-generated code with pattern-based warnings, LLM-powered diff review on Stop, and agentic commit review for common vulnerability classes.
